text:
There was once a fisherman who lived on the coast. Every morning he would cast his line into the warm water. There was always a story behind each cast—he sought a big fish, maybe a great white. One morning he hooked something huge. A colossal whale. She pulled him into the deep. He waved goodbye. Every day he came back.

After a while, villagers began to tell tales about the wise whale. How she saved countless souls. People would gather for days to watch her graceful movements. One day the villagers caught her a net. The whale grieved for her freedom.

They named her Glory. They watched her every year, hoping to capture another adventure.

One day Glory wasn't around. The water cleared. No sign of her.

The fishermen mourned. Their hearts broke. But they didn't give up hope. They learned to predict where she would appear. They even had a whale watching tour.

Years went by. The fishermen visited Glory often. They shared a life
